name: AREthRemoveProvidedEventGroup
title: AREthRemoveProvidedEventGroup
description: Removes an Event Group from a Provided Service Instance. The Event Group was previously added by AREthAddProvidedEventGroup.
The Events and Fields assigned to the Event Group are not deleted when the Event Group is closed.

parameters.name: pevgHandle
parameters.description: Handle of the Event Group (see AREthAddProvidedEventGroup).
